message:
fix(mermaid): re-apply class annotations + fix gantt/sequence bugs

Class diagram annotations (bd-2d9fm):
- Re-apply annotation support lost to multi-agent code drift
- NodeDraft annotation field + ClassMember <<annotation>> detection
- render_class_compartments annotation row with dynamic row tracking
- Feature matrix class: Partial -> Supported

Gantt renderer fixes:
- Section separator line no longer overwrites section label text
- u16 overflow protection for display_width cast

Sequence diagram layout fix:
- Build ir.nodes -> participant column mapping to fix edge routing
  when note nodes or non-participant nodes exist (would cause edges
  to route to wrong columns or be silently dropped)
- Use rendered_idx counter to eliminate Y-position gaps from skipped edges

Architecture parser fix:
- split_architecture_in_clause now finds FIRST top-level " in ", not LAST

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
